zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan LeWalleys於1375年1月出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特普爾貝可時，她的父親John Le Waleys II25歲，母親Joan Walsh of Langton28歲。她於1398年之前與John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh在英國多瑟特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan LeWalleys于1375年1月出生在英国英格兰多瑟特普爾貝可时，她的父亲John Le Waleys II25岁，母亲Joan Walsh of Langton28岁。她于1398年之前与John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh在英国多瑟特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年在英国英格兰多瑟特享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan LeWalleys was born in January 1375, in Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Le Waleys II, was 25 and her mother, Joan Walsh of Langton, was 28. She married John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh before 1398, in Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1468, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan LeWalleys est née en janvier 1375, à Purbeck, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Le Waleys II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Walsh of Langton, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh avant 1398, à Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1468, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan LeWalleys im Januar 1375 in Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Le Waleys II 25 und ihre Mutter Joan Walsh of Langton 28. Sie hat vor 1398 in Dorset, England John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1468 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan LeWalleys è nata il nel gennaio 1375 nel Purbeck, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Le Waleys II, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Joan Walsh of Langton, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh prima del 1398, nel Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1468, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan LeWalleysが1375年1月にイギリスイギリスドールセトプウルベックで生まれた時，父John Le Waleys IIは25歳，母Joan Walsh of Langtonは28歳であった。1398年以前にイギリスドールセトでJohn Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan LeWalleys(이)가 1375년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 푸르벡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Le Waleys II(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Walsh of Langton(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1398년 이전 영국 도르세트에서 John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan LeWalleys nasceu em janeiro de 1375, em Purbeck, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Le Waleys II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Walsh of Langton, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh antes 1398, em Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1468, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan LeWalleys родилась январь 1375 г. в местности пурбекк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Le Waleys II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Walsh of Langton, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh перед 1398 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1468 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan LeWalleys nació en enero de 1375, en Purbeck, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Le Waleys II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Walsh of Langton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh antes de 1398, en Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1468, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 93 años.
